Interface Member

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, NamedModelElement, ProgramModelElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ClassType, Constructor, Field, Method
All Known Implementing Classes:
ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, ConstructorDeclaration, DefaultConstructor, EnumClassDeclaration, FieldSpecification, ImplicitFieldSpecification, InterfaceDeclaration, MethodDeclaration, NullType, SuperArrayDeclaration, TypeDeclaration
public interface Member extends ProgramModelElement
A program model element representing members.

  • Method Details

    • isFinal

      boolean isFinal()
      Checks if this member is final.
      Returns:
      true if this member is final, false otherwise.

    • isStatic

      boolean isStatic()
      Checks if this member is static. Returns true for Constructors.
      Returns:
      true if this member is static, false otherwise.

    • isPrivate

      boolean isPrivate()
      Checks if this member is private.
      Returns:
      true if this member is private, false otherwise.

    • isProtected

      boolean isProtected()
      Checks if this member is protected.
      Returns:
      true if this member is protected, false otherwise.

    • isPublic

      boolean isPublic()
      Checks if this member is public.
      Returns:
      true if this member is public, false otherwise.

    • isStrictFp

      boolean isStrictFp()
      Checks if this member is strictfp.
      Returns:
      true if this member is strictfp, false otherwise.
